h1: The Chain of Custody for Monetary Truth
intro: In enterprise finance, money does not become truth when it moves. It becomes truth when its currency state can be traced, controlled, reconciled, reported, consolidated, and defended.
thesis_quote: AccountCcy.com maps the chain of custody for monetary truth inside enterprise finance. It is not a currency conversion site.

state_rail.name: Quoted Currency
state_rail.description: A price signal appears before an obligation exists.

state_rail.name: Transaction Currency
state_rail.description: The obligation takes a denomination that finance must preserve.

state_rail.name: Settlement Currency
state_rail.description: Cash movement proves payment behavior, not the whole truth.

state_rail.name: Account Currency
state_rail.description: ERP custody assigns how the balance will be maintained.

state_rail.name: Ledger Currency
state_rail.description: Entity books measure the maintained position.

state_rail.name: Reporting Currency
state_rail.description: Presentation turns measured results into management and filing language.

state_rail.name: Consolidation Currency
state_rail.description: Group reporting absorbs entity proofs into a shared view.

state_rail.name: Audit Reality
state_rail.description: The path becomes defensible only when evidence can replay every state.

problem_title: Currency movement is not the same thing as monetary truth.
problem_body: A monetary amount can be quoted, obligated, settled, assigned to account custody, measured in the ledger, reported, consolidated, and defended. Each state changes what the number means institutionally.

AccountCcy.com treats those eight states as a custody chain. The goal is not to convert one currency into another; it is to make the currency state of a monetary figure traceable across enterprise finance.
When teams collapse custody states into one familiar ISO code, reconciliations may tie while evidence still fails. The framework makes those transitions explicit, bounded, and replayable.
primary_section_body: AccountCcy.com is governed as a reference-grade category asset. The homepage establishes the thesis, exposes the state chain, directs readers to doctrine and framework pages, and surfaces diagnostic and acquisition pathways without sales pressure.
The public identity remains the chain of custody for monetary truth inside enterprise finance.

problem_cards.label: Ontology
problem_cards.title: Eight currency states, one custody chain.
problem_cards.body: The chain runs from quoted currency through audit reality, with each state changing ownership, evidence, and reporting meaning.

problem_cards.label: Engine
problem_cards.title: Diagnostic output, not passive reading.
problem_cards.body: The Currency State Diagnostic converts doctrine into a local maturity reading without collecting data.

problem_cards.label: Reference
problem_cards.title: Pages built for serious professional intent.
problem_cards.body: ERP control, revaluation, translation, misconfiguration, reporting, consolidation, and audit reality are connected through the same graph.

problem_cards.label: Acquisition
problem_cards.title: A category asset, not a loose web property.
problem_cards.body: The acquisition posture is strategic, restrained, and tied to ownership of language, ontology, reference graph, and diagnostic surface.

control_point_title: Account currency is the control point where monetary movement enters accounting custody.
control_point_body: State 04 decides how balances live inside accounts, which populations revalue, which reconciliations scope, and which evidence reviewers can replay. It is the hinge between external monetary movement and internal accounting truth.
account_currency_definition: Account currency is the monetary context assigned to an account, balance, obligation line, ledger position, or monetary record for controlled maintenance and reconstruction.
homepage_doctrine: A number is not automatically truth. A balance is not automatically defensible. A report is not automatically explainable. Monetary truth becomes defensible when currency-state custody can be traced.
audience_title: Built for the teams that must prove monetary lineage.
audience_intro: The reference system is designed for professionals who need accountable vocabulary before systems, reports, and reviews can align.

audience_cards.label: Controllers
audience_cards.title: Control account currency policy.
audience_cards.body: Clarify which accounts carry which custody currency and how exceptions are evidenced.

audience_cards.label: ERP architects
audience_cards.title: Translate policy into configuration.
audience_cards.body: Connect chart settings, subledger integrations, posting logic, and close snapshots.

audience_cards.label: CFO teams
audience_cards.title: Explain reporting without weak FX narratives.
audience_cards.body: Separate revaluation, translation, reporting, consolidation, and audit reality.

audience_cards.label: Assurance teams
audience_cards.title: Review evidence, not slogans.
audience_cards.body: Trace monetary outcomes through artifacts that survive reconstruction.

audience_cards.label: Platforms
audience_cards.title: Own the control language.
audience_cards.body: Financial close, reconciliation, consolidation, ERP, and audit technology buyers can extend the framework into product workflows.

audience_cards.label: Strategic buyers
audience_cards.title: Acquire category infrastructure.
audience_cards.body: The value is the domain, thesis, ontology, reference graph, diagnostic surface, and governance discipline together.

acquisition_preview_title: AccountCcy.com may be considered for strategic acquisition where institutional alignment exists.
acquisition_preview_body: The public posture is not domain-sale language. It is a controlled asset-transfer posture for buyers who understand account currency control, enterprise finance systems, reporting integrity, consolidation discipline, and audit-defensible monetary truth.
